---
title: "Project 3: Risk Management"
format: html
---

# Project 3: Risk Management

## Overview

This project focuses on risk management principles and how organisations identify, assess, and respond to different types of risk.

## Objectives

- identify key business risks
- evaluate likelihood and impact
- discuss mitigation strategies
- reflect on the importance of structured risk planning

## Key Discussion

Risk management is important because it helps organisations reduce uncertainty and prepare for operational, financial, and strategic challenges. A good risk management framework improves decision making and supports long-term sustainability.

## Skills Demonstrated

- critical analysis
- professional communication
- structured reporting
- applied business understanding

## Reflection

This project helped me understand how risk can affect decision-making and why organisations need clear frameworks to manage uncertainty effectively.
